function solve(prices: number[], strategy: number[], k: number): number {
    const n = prices.length;
    let originalProfit = 0;
    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
        originalProfit += strategy[i] * prices[i];
    }
    
    const A = new Array(n);
    const B = new Array(n);
    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
        A[i] = -strategy[i] * prices[i];
        B[i] = (1 - strategy[i]) * prices[i];
    }
    
    const prefixA = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);
    const prefixB = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);
    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
        prefixA[i + 1] = prefixA[i] + A[i];
        prefixB[i + 1] = prefixB[i] + B[i];
    }
    
    const m = k / 2;
    let maxDelta = 0;
    for (let i = 0; i <= n - k; i++) {
        const endA = i + m;
        const endB = i + k;
        const sumA = prefixA[endA] - prefixA[i];
        const sumB = prefixB[endB] - prefixB[i + m];
        const delta = sumA + sumB;
        if (delta > maxDelta) {
            maxDelta = delta;
        }
    }
    
    return originalProfit + Math.max(0, maxDelta);
}
